CustomField.description: Lifecycle state of this submission request. Awaiting Submission is set by the Credential_Request_Creation flow when the Credential status changes to Requested - the volunteer has not yet submitted. Pending Review is set by the LWC (or Intake Flow) when the volunteer submits - triggers admin review. Changing to Approved triggers the Credential_Request_Approval flow, which copies Issued_By__c and Expiry_Date__c to the linked Credential__c. Rejected records are retained for audit.
CustomField.label: Status
